_title: Phase 16 Deep Forensic Investigation — Master Cross-Reference

thread_1_robinhood_606.pfof_structure: RHS receives PFOF, passes 80% to RHF. Fixed % of NBBO spread (12.35% reg hrs, 9% extended)
thread_1_robinhood_606.significance: Citadel receives 37% of options PFOF and ~21-28% of equity routing from Robinhood. This makes Citadel the dominant counterparty to every Robinhood retail order.

thread_2_robinhood_x17a5.hq: 500 Colonial Center Parkway, Suite 100, Lake Mary, FL 32746
thread_2_robinhood_x17a5.jan_2021_investigation: SEC Enforcement closed investigation into Early 2021 Trading Restrictions and employee trading on January 10, 2025
thread_2_robinhood_x17a5.significance: Robinhood's own X-17A-5 reveals $33.5M in Reg SHO penalties for systematic failures spanning 2018-2024. The SEC closing the Jan 2021 investigation does NOT cover the May 2024 events.

peak.context: T+2 settlement of May 13 (day Roaring Kitty returned to X)

pre_event_spike.explanation: FTDs surged from 941 (May 3) to 525,493 (May 8) — 7 days BEFORE RK's public return

thread_3_sec_ftd.significance: FTDs exploded 7 days BEFORE Roaring Kitty's public return. The May 6-8 spike (186K→525K shares) at $16-18/share suggests institutional positioning or foreknowledge of the coming event. AMC shows a parallel spike peaking May 7 (6.7M shares), confirming systematic rather than idiosyncratic failure.

thread_4_citadel_edgar.hq: 200 South Biscayne Boulevard, Suite 3300, Miami, FL 33131
thread_4_citadel_edgar.significance: Member's capital dropped $5.48B in one year. Derivative notional exceeds 33× total assets. 44% of all repo is intercompany. $14.16B in unsettled forward repos bridge the year-end balance sheet date.

cross_reference_connections: Citadel receives 37% of Robinhood's OPTIONS order flow — $282.5M in PFOF for 2024
Citadel's FY2024 X-17A-5 shows $20M in intercompany FTD receivables
SEC FTD data shows GME fails exploded 7 days BEFORE public catalyst (May 6-8)
Robinhood was penalized $33.5M for Reg SHO and Blue Sheet failures spanning 2018-2024
Both entities relocated to Florida (Citadel: Miami 2022, Robinhood: Lake Mary)
Both entities file FOCUS reports as broker-dealers under Rule 15c3-1 alternative method
Pre-event FTD timing (May 6-8) correlates with institutional pre-positioning, not retail activity
